mapper.select: SELECT * FROM post WHERE author_id IN ( SELECT addressee_id FROM connection WHERE requester_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACCEPTED' UNION SELECT requester_id FROM connection WHERE addressee_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACCEPTED' UNION SELECT #{userId} ) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM post WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY like_count DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (author_id, content, media_url) VALUES (#{authorId}, #{content}, #{mediaUrl})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post WHERE id = #{id} AND author_id = #{authorId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO post_like (user_id, post_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{postId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM post_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = #{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET comment_count = GREATEST(comment_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM post_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_comment (post_id, author_id, content) VALUES (#{postId}, #{authorId}, #{content})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_comment WHERE id = #{id} AND author_id = #{authorId}
